name: Bread & Butter Pickles (Mother Stickney's Very Best)
recipeInstructions:
1. Do not pare cucumbers; slice them thinly.
2. Add chopped green peppers and whole garlic cloves to the sliced cucumbers.
3. Add salt.
4. Cover with cracked ice.
5. Let stand in the refrigerator for 3 hours, then drain.
6. Pour remaining ingredients over cucumber mixture.
7. Heat just to boiling.
8. Seal in jars. Makes about 9 pints.
